title: Primordial cosmology and CMB constraints
statement: The TECT early-universe phase-transition history yields a primordial perturbation spectrum (spectral index $n_s$, tensor-to-scalar ratio $r$) consistent with CMB constraints, with the Brazovskii dynamics as the structure-seeding mechanism.
scope: OPEN scaffold. Primordial/inflationary history and CMB compatibility (pillar P11; GAP-4). Distinct from F1 (late-time dark sector / $\Lambda$).
falsifier: A predicted $n_s$ or $r$ outside observational bounds after input freeze (GAP-4).
no_overclaim: No primordial spectrum is derived; CMB compatibility is the target, not a result.
next_action: Determine whether the Brazovskii transition supports a slow-roll-like epoch; estimate $n_s$, $r$.
